name: Winter Wonderland Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the cake according to the box instructions, substituting 1/3 cup Amaretto for water.
2. Bake in two greased 8-inch cake pans as directed on the package.
3. Allow cakes to cool in the pans for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from pans and continue cooling on wire racks.
5. If needed, level the tops of the cakes.
6. In a chilled deep bowl, beat cream until stiff.
7. Add 2 tablespoons Confectioner's sugar and 1/4 cup Amaretto, then beat until stiff.
8. Place one cake layer on a serving plate and spread with about 1 cup of the cream mixture.
9. Top with second layer and frost well.
10. Chill for 4 hours before decorating.
11. Melt chocolate morsels over hot water until smooth.
12. Spread in a thin layer (about 1/4 inch) on foil, then chill until firm enough to cut.
13. Using cookie cutters, cut out tree shapes from the cooled chocolate.
14. If using cardboard, trace and cut out trees.
15. Decorate the top of the cake with the trees or place larger trees over the sides of the cake and sprinkle with green sugar.
16. Add the decorated trees just before serving to prevent them from melting.
